race.comment: LET IT RIDE (7) finally put it all together here last start, scoring with a bit in hand to break through. Stays at the mile and has more to offer fourth-up. FLASH ALICE (5) lost the rider last time but had put together some solid efforts prior. She gets in well with the 2kg claim and is right in the mix if she returns to her best. HEAD OF THE HERD (4) arrived just in time to score here a fortnight ago. From a middle draw, he should get the right run again and can make it back-to-back wins. Veteran FRANCE'S BOY (12) steps out for start 170 and is sure to give a bold sight on speed from a favourable inside draw. DUNREAL (3) was below his best fresh but has trialled well since. The wide gate is a hurdle, though a smart ride can see him competitive.
